```{=html}
<!-- ── Countdown Banner ── -->
<div class="countdown-wrap">
  <div class="countdown-label">departing rdu in</div>
  <div class="countdown-tiles">
    <div class="tile"><span id="cd-days">--</span><small>days</small></div>
    <div class="tile-sep">:</div>
    <div class="tile"><span id="cd-hours">--</span><small>hrs</small></div>
    <div class="tile-sep">:</div>
    <div class="tile"><span id="cd-mins">--</span><small>min</small></div>
    <div class="tile-sep">:</div>
    <div class="tile"><span id="cd-secs">--</span><small>sec</small></div>
  </div>
  <div class="countdown-label" id="cd-sub">rdu → dub · fri oct 2, 8:25 pm</div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  // Oct 2, 2026 20:25 Eastern (UTC-4 in October)
  const departure = new Date("2026-10-02T20:25:00-04:00");

  function pad(n) { return String(n).padStart(2, "0"); }

  function tick() {
    const now = new Date();
    const diff = departure - now;

    if (diff <= 0) {
      document.getElementById("cd-days").textContent = "✈";
      document.getElementById("cd-hours").textContent = "00";
      document.getElementById("cd-mins").textContent = "00";
      document.getElementById("cd-secs").textContent = "00";
      document.getElementById("cd-sub").textContent = "bon voyage!";
      return;
    }

    const days  = Math.floor(diff / 86400000);
    const hours = Math.floor((diff % 86400000) / 3600000);
    const mins  = Math.floor((diff % 3600000)  / 60000);
    const secs  = Math.floor((diff % 60000)    / 1000);

    document.getElementById("cd-days").textContent  = days;
    document.getElementById("cd-hours").textContent = pad(hours);
    document.getElementById("cd-mins").textContent  = pad(mins);
    document.getElementById("cd-secs").textContent  = pad(secs);
  }

  tick();
  setInterval(tick, 1000);
})();
</script>
```
